creator: flo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,
 
 you are missing the codec-negotioation patch, that's the reason why i 
 did not update net/asterisk14. I tried to update the patch to 1.4.39 but 
 i failed.
 
 Just dropping it did not seem appropriate to me. I know the situation is 
 bad, either dropping functionality or staying with a vulnerable version.
 
 Cheers,
 Florian
